_comment: Deterministic acuity map. ESI (Emergency Severity Index): 1 = resuscitation (most acute) … 5 = non-urgent. Acuity = the MOST-acute (lowest) level implied by any present finding or dangerous vital, then floored by any fired red-flag rule's min_esi. Approval is forced for ESI <= approval_required_max_esi (critical risk => explicit human authorization [Intro 96]).

action_for_band.ED_NOW: Direct to Emergency Department now; activate the on-call clinician.
action_for_band.URGENT: Book an urgent same-day in-person assessment.
action_for_band.SELF_CARE: Provide self-care guidance with explicit safety-netting advice.
